channel.title: About on Adrika Chaudhuri
channel.description: Recent content in About on Adrika Chaudhuri

item.title: Adrika Chaudhuri
item.description: Hey, I’m Adrika, a fourth-year undergrad at IISER Kolkata. I am majoring in Biology and minoring in Physics. I like behavioral neurobiology, modelling different systems, and studying how behavior changes with context to learning and social interaction. I have grown to appreciate how collective interactions always lead to emergent phenomena in a scale-invariant manner, and I am switching to mechanobiology of collective cell migration in MDCK II sheets for my MS thesis next sem onwards.
